description_long: This is a rugged pick hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head with two pointed ends, ideal for breaking or chipping hard surfaces such as stone or concrete. The head is securely mounted on a thick, slightly curved wooden handle, which is wrapped with a textured grip for enhanced handling and comfort. The wood grain and wrapping detail are visible, suggesting durability and ergonomic design for extended use. The metal head shows a matte, slightly weathered finish, indicating it is built for heavy-duty tasks. The overall construction appears solid, with no visible fasteners or detachable parts. This tool is commonly found in urban maintenance, construction, or landscaping settings.
description: A sturdy pick hammer with a dark metal head and a textured, curved wooden handle, designed for breaking hard surfaces. The tool features a weathered finish and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-pointed metal head and the textured wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the head and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite side of the metal head and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the head and the handle's ergonomic curve.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a textured, wrapped grip for ergonomic handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-pointed pick head made of steel, with both ends tapering to sharp points for breaking or chipping.
